name: GOLFTEC Grand Rapids South
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training facility offering lessons, club fitting, and practice services. Utilizing advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, their certified PGA coaches provide data-driven swing analysis and personalized improvement plans. The company operates multiple locations worldwide and emphasizes a structured approach to golf improvement through its proven methodology and comprehensive coaching programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized coaching plans tailored to individual skill levels
State-of-the-art technology provides immediate visual feedback
Comprehensive services including lessons, fittings, and practice memberships

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though students are encouraged to bring their own if they have them. The facility offers club rentals and fittings to help players find the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC locations. The focus is on golf training technology and coaching. Outside food and beverage policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: While specific timing isn't provided, typical simulator rounds at technology-driven facilities like GOLFTEC generally take 45-60 minutes depending on course and player pace. Practice sessions are structured around individual improvement goals.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and instruction specifically designed for youth golfers. Their technology-based approach helps juniors visually understand swing mechanics, and they have certified coaches experienced with beginner and young players.
